##NAMES=Larderellite
##RRUFFID=R130392
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(NH_4_)B_5_O_7_(OH)_2_·H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Larderello Lagoon, Tuscany, Italy
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Jenkins (capsule), Rock Currier (rock piece)
##DESCRIPTION=Soft, vitreous, opaque white botryoidal crust, in part altered on surface to off-white tiny granules of ammonioborite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R130392
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 9.465 b: 7.625 c: 11.647 alpha: 90 beta: 96.94 gamma: 90 volume: 834.4 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
